mapper.select: SELECT code FROM tb_union_subject WHERE parent_code = #{parentCode} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT code FROM tb_union_subject WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id,code,name,parent_code parentCode,level,create_time createTime,update_time updateTime FROM tb_union_subject
code LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword},'%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
ORDER BY LPAD(code,12,'0')
SELECT id,code,name,parent_code parentCode,level,create_time createTime,update_time updateTime FROM tb_union_subject WHERE id=#{id}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_union_subject
and code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{query.code},'%') and name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{query.name},'%')
